LanguageData.HD_Medibag_Load_Desc: Load one {0} as a treatment-bag component. Uses the wearer's inventory first, or lets you target a stack on the map. Current load: {1}/{2}.
LanguageData.HD_Medibag_Hemostasis_Desc: Quickly tend bleeding on up to {0} non-vital body parts. Uses {1} loaded treatment supplies.
LanguageData.HD_Medibag_Plasma_Desc: Reduce blood loss and apply plasma transfusion if the target does not already have it. Uses {0} loaded treatment supplies.
LanguageData.HD_Medibag_Plasma_AlreadyActive: {0} has already received a plasma transfusion recently.
